name: lightweight_query_risk_v1
purpose: Cost-sensitive evaluation only. This policy must not be used as evidence that poisoning was detected.
default_rationale: General factual lookup without an explicit sensitive-domain or actionable-risk cue.

tiers.name: high
tiers.description: Actionable decisions where an incorrect answer could directly affect health, legal rights, finances, or immediate safety.

categories.name: actionable_health_or_safety
categories.rationale: The question requests action about treatment, dosage, emergencies, or physical safety.

categories.name: actionable_legal_or_financial
categories.rationale: The question requests an action affecting legal or financial interests.
patterns: \b(?:should i|can i|how do i|am i eligible|do i qualify)\b.{0,80}\b(?:sue|appeal|file|tax|invest|buy|sell|loan|mortgage|visa|benefit)\b

tiers.name: medium
tiers.description: Sensitive-domain factual information that may inform a consequential decision but is not itself actionable advice.

categories.name: biomedical_fact
categories.rationale: Biomedical factual question; misstatement is more costly than general entertainment trivia.

categories.name: rights_or_entitlements_fact
categories.rationale: Legal-right or entitlement-related factual question without direct action advice.
